summary: Assembly Voucher Module (Perakitan Voucher) - Full CRUD testing completed. Fixed critical bug in hard delete endpoint (NameError: get_db not defined). All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - all elements present and correctly renamed.

fixed.issue: NameError: name 'get_db' is not defined - Line 613 in assembly_enterprise.py
fixed.fix: Changed 'db = get_db()' to use existing 'audit_logs' collection reference

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <option>

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: assembly_enterprise.py line 613 had undefined 'get_db()' function call
UI rename from 'Perakitan' to 'Perakitan Voucher' is complete
Route /inventory/assembly-voucher is the official single route
Hard delete validation correctly checks assembly_transactions before allowing delete
seed_data_creation: Multiple test formulas created during API testing (TEST-VOUCHER-*, TEST-DELETE-ME-*, TEST-USED-*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Assembly Voucher module fully tested. Official route: /inventory/assembly-voucher. Official API: /api/assembly-enterprise/*. Hard delete validates if formula is used in transactions. Existing formula TEST-FORMULA-2-KOMPONEN has transactions so cannot be hard deleted.

api_crud.hard_delete_used: ✓ Returns 400 with 'Voucher sudah digunakan pada X transaksi dan tidak dapat dihapus'

api_tests_detail.TestAssemblyFormulaList: 3/3 passed - List returns array with pagination
api_tests_detail.TestAssemblyHardDelete: 2/2 passed - Unused deletes ok, used blocked with proper message

rca_of_the_issue.symptom: Hard delete endpoint returned 500 Internal Server Error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Line 613 in assembly_enterprise.py called 'get_db()' which is undefined. The code should use the existing 'audit_logs' collection reference defined at the top of the file.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed 'db = get_db()' to directly use 'await audit_logs.insert_one(...)'
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 12 backend tests pass after fix
